content.text: How can I automatically ensure that all custom HStoreField instances in my Django models are properly registered when they are defined?
What is the impact if a field type we want to process, like HStoreField, was defined in a base class rather than locally?
Since this function iterates exclusively over `model._meta.local_fields`, any fields inherited from parent classes would be skipped by this specific logic.
That makes sense; I need to make sure my custom field types are applied directly.
